# AZ Restaurant Partners

> The embedded technology-and-strategy team for independent, family-run restaurants in Greater
> Houston, TX. AZ studies how each restaurant actually operates, then engineers one connected system
> around it — the doctrine is "use what works, connect what you have, build what's missing": the best
> existing tools deeply set up and customized where they fit, connected to what the restaurant already
> has, and custom software built only where nothing off the shelf does the job (like the live AI phone
> agent that writes orders straight into the POS). Sometimes the highest-ROI fix isn't software at
> all — a review card on the table, a smarter offer at the right moment — and AZ engineers those too.
> Every layer: get found (Google + AI answers), win the order, keep the guest, see your numbers.
> Built and run by Abbas Zoeb, an ex-Google software engineer who also owns an award-winning
> restaurant (Wok & Karahi, Spring, TX), where every play is proven first. The operator keeps their
> customers and data, authorizes every change, pays no vendor commissions, and only pays once they're
> saving. Foundation plans from $99/mo; custom work scoped separately.

## What AZ does (offerings)
- Commission Rescue — move orders off the ~30% third-party delivery apps to first-party ordering.
- AI Phone Agent — answer every call 24/7, take orders into the POS, book tables, handle catering.
- Get found by AI & Google — AEO/SEO so AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity) and search recommend the restaurant.
- More 5-star reviews — solicit happy guests, intercept unhappy ones before they post.
- Win back regulars — loyalty, consent-based SMS, and a guest list the owner owns.
- Catering & corporate lunches — a real off-premise channel at higher margins.
- End the tablet chaos — delivery apps consolidated into one POS/kitchen.
- See your numbers — one clear dashboard of sales, labor, and food cost across locations.
- Custom engineering — when no existing tool fits, AZ builds the software (or the non-software play) the restaurant uniquely needs.

- Founder: Abbas Zoeb — ex-Google software engineer; owner-operator of Wok & Karahi (Spring, TX).

- Deal: no vendor commissions; you only pay once you're saving; month-to-month.
